## License Question Type
- [ ] Commercial use inquiry
- [ ] Contribution agreement clarification
- [ ] Third-party integration licensing
- [ ] Distribution rights question
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Question Details
Please describe your license question in detail. Include:
1. What you want to do with RootFont
2. Any commercial context
3. Specific licensing concerns

## Use Case
Describe your specific use case:
- Personal project
- Commercial product
- Open source project
- Internal business tool
- Educational use
- Other: _____

## Proposed Usage
If applicable, describe:
- Will you modify the code?
- Will you distribute the software?
- Will you charge for your product/service?
- Estimated user base size

## Contact Information
If you'd prefer a private response, provide your contact email:
- Email: _____

## Additional Context
Add any other context or files about the license question here.

## Response Preference
- [ ] Public response (in this issue)
- [ ] Private response (via email)
- [ ] Either is fine
